name: Dr. Prasenjit Adak
title: Educator · Researcher · Creator
tagline: A mind that moves between the rigour of scholarship and the freedom of art.

bio: I am Dr. Prasenjit Adak — an academic, researcher, and maker with a passion for ideas that cross boundaries. My work spans the classroom and the laboratory, the studio and the screen.
Whether I'm teaching the next generation, publishing research, composing music, or building digital products — I bring the same depth of thought and care for craft to everything I do.

work.title: Teaching
work.description: Shaping minds through thoughtful pedagogy, engaging lectures, and a deep commitment to student growth. Education, for me, is not just a profession — it is a calling.

work.title: Research
work.description: Pursuing original inquiry at the intersection of disciplines. My research is driven by questions that matter, methodologies that are rigorous, and insights that endure.

play.title: Music
play.description: Composing, listening, and letting sound shape thought.

play.title: Books
play.description: A lifelong reader moving across genres, languages, and centuries.

play.title: 3D Models
play.description: Sculpting ideas into form — virtual geometry as a creative medium.

play.title: Graphics Designing
play.description: Visual storytelling through composition, colour, and type.

play.title: App Development
play.description: Building tools that solve real problems with elegant interfaces.

play.title: Websites
play.description: Crafting digital experiences with purpose, precision, and personality.

play.title: e-Commerce
play.description: From storefronts to checkout flows — building commerce that converts and delights.

contact.intro: Whether it's a collaboration, a conversation, or simply a hello — I'd love to hear from you.
